sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 107:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 107:1
items.html: Because the vessels were from the phase of ZAT, which are judgement, and the lights were of GAR, which are mercy. (Inner Light, Item 40)
